baseline.notes: Frozen V4 clean-IID reference; V5 must not reinterpret this checkpoint as selected by a V5 metric.

dataset_and_isolation.hard_role_policy: Hard roles must not contribute to training, normalization, hyperparameter choice, threshold tuning, checkpoint selection, or early stopping. They are frozen descriptive reports only.
dataset_and_isolation.test_policy: test_iid and hard_challenge_test are report-only; neither may influence feature construction, model choice, threshold choice, or checkpoint choice.
dataset_and_isolation.normalization_policy: Every learned standardizer, including global-context standardization, is fit from train=672 only.

clean_success_thresholds.warm_start_direction_requirement: For a feasibility pass, valid sample-first CV-relative RMSE and point-global relative RMSE must both improve versus frozen V4; raw CV-RMSE, hotspot RMSE, and strong-q RMSE may not materially degrade.

field_semantics.native_reconstruction: DeltaT_hat = s_hat * phi_hat; raw temperature is reconstructed and then Dirichlet-projected in raw-temperature space.
field_semantics.cv_weights: Rectilinear cell-centered control-volume weights inferred from coords.npy; weight sums are checked against P5 metadata when source samples are available.

definitions.point_global_relative_rmse_pct: sqrt(sum pointwise raw-DeltaT error^2 / N) / (sum abs(true raw-DeltaT) / N) * 100; this preserves the V4 relative-RMSE denominator.
definitions.sample_first_cv_relative_rmse_pct: mean over samples of CV_RMS(pred-target) / CV_RMS(target) * 100.
definitions.amplitude_ratio: sample mean of CV_RMS(pred DeltaT) / CV_RMS(true DeltaT).
definitions.spatial_correlation: sample mean CV-weighted centered spatial correlation.
definitions.hotspot_cv_weighted_rmse_K: CV-weighted RMSE on the sample's deterministic top 5 percent true DeltaT nodes.
definitions.top5_cv_weighted_rmse_K: CV-weighted RMSE on each sample's five highest true DeltaT nodes.
definitions.strong_q_cv_weighted_rmse_K: CV-weighted RMSE on positive-q nodes at or above the sample's q 90th percentile.
definitions.low_deltaT_background: Nodes at or below each sample's true DeltaT p50; report signed bias, CV-weighted RMSE, and CV-weighted overprediction ratio.
definitions.shape_cv_rmse: sample mean CV_RMS(phi_hat - phi_true), where both shapes use their own positive CV-RMS scale.
definitions.legacy_normalized_valid_base_mse: Pointwise MSE in the frozen V4 normalized DeltaT target space; retained as a separately selected control checkpoint.
